generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? While some argue for global cooperation, real strategic autonomy means investing in our own capabilities. It's not just about security—it's about preserving our values and way of life. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
